message:
🐛 Hide title for ALL needs_triage items + add emoji prefixes

- Hide title/description for all needs_triage items (not just others')
- Show "Awaiting maintainer attention" for items pending triage
- Add 🐛 emoji prefix for bug titles
- Add ✨ emoji prefix for feature request titles
